name: Lisas Chicken Stuffed Shells
recipeIngredient: 10 oz pkg frozen broccoli, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook shells until done (slightly firm). Rinse in cold water to handle, set aside.
2. In a small saucepan, warm cream cheese until melted. Stir in milk, chives, and parmesan cheese until smooth.
3. In a mixing bowl, stir together chicken, broccoli, pepper, and pimento. Add 3/4 cup of the sauce, mix well, and stuff into shells.
4. Lightly oil a 9x13 inch pan or spray with PAM. Arrange stuffed shells in the dish. Pour over remaining sauce, top with Monterey jack cheese, and sprinkle with paprika.
5. Cover with foil and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
